title: Cell Layout
description: Drag-and-drop cell layout for engineering design documentation.

pageSize.title: Page size
pageSize.description: Physical page size for the summary-mode layout canvas. A4 is 210 × 297 mm, A3 is 297 × 420 mm. Per-notebook overrides are stored in notebook metadata.

orientation.title: Orientation
orientation.description: Default page orientation for new notebooks. Landscape swaps the page's width and height. Per-notebook overrides are stored in notebook metadata.

defaultSummaryLines.title: Default summary lines
defaultSummaryLines.description: Number of input lines visible in summary mode before truncation.

gridSnap.title: Grid snap (mm)
gridSnap.description: Snap grid size in millimetres for cell drag/resize. Set to 0 to disable snapping.

showReadingOrderBadges.title: Show reading-order badges
showReadingOrderBadges.description: Show a small numbered badge on each cell in summary mode indicating its PDF export reading order (left-to-right, top-to-bottom).

smartGuides.title: Smart alignment guides
smartGuides.description: When dragging or resizing a cell, show alignment guides and snap to nearby cell edges, centres, and page edges. Smart-guide snap takes precedence over the grid snap when within tolerance (2 mm).
